next_steps: Pleural fluid cytology with immunoperoxidase staining (e.g., CK, TTF-1, CD138, CD20, CD3)
Pleural fluid analysis for ADA, AFB smear, and mycobacterial culture
Contrast-enhanced CT chest, abdomen, and pelvis to assess for primary malignancy or lymphadenopathy
Serum protein electrophoresis (SPEP) and serum free light chain assay
Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage and transbronchial biopsy of lung opacities
Thoracoscopic pleural biopsy if cytology/bronchoscopy are nondiagnostic
